person.name: Jordan Lee
person.title: DevOps / SRE Engineer
person.bio: I build paved roads for developers: safe deploys, clear signals, and infrastructure you can reason about.

greeting.headline: Platform engineer making deploys boring (in a good way).
greeting.subheadline: Kubernetes, Terraform, and observability for teams that ship often.

experience.description: Own multi-cluster platform, golden paths, and incident response.
highlights: Reduced MTTR 50% with better runbooks and paging policy
Standardized Terraform modules adopted by 12 product teams
